name: @metorial/prismic
description: Query, create, and manage structured content in a headless CMS repository. Read published content via REST or GraphQL APIs with filtering, sorting, pagination, and advanced predicates (full-text search, date ranges, geolocation). Manage content types and shared slices programmatically — create, read, update, and delete custom type schemas. Migrate content by creating and updating draft documents in a repository. Upload, update, and delete media assets (images, videos, documents) in the media library. Integrate third-party data sources via integration fields. Receive webhooks for document publish/unpublish events, release changes, and tag changes.
